block_00: Card chhaviyaan asvikrit kar di gayi
block_01: Durbhaagy se, aapke dvaara submit ki gayi debit/credit card pratiyaan asvikrt kar di gayen kyonki ve chhaviyaan dhundhale hain. Kripya neeche diye gaye link ke maadhyam se naye card chhaviyaan upload karen.
block_03: Hum aapke sahyog aur samajh ki saraahana karte hain.
block_06: ko aapke prashnon ka jawab dene me khushi hogi.
